title: APUSH date-tagged developments — anachronism verifier + distractor pool
note: Each development is a real historical development with a year (or range), period, and theme tags. Two roles: (1) ANACHRONISM VERIFIER — the generator/checker confirms a keyed CAUSE predates the stimulus and a keyed EFFECT postdates it, and that a 'wrong_era' distractor genuinely violates the stimulus era; (2) DISTRACTOR POOL — period-plausible developments to draw true-but-irrelevant / wrong-era / scope-mismatch distractors from. Dates are standard textbook dates; verify against a public-domain reference (OpenStax US History) at generation time. This is a SEED set for core periods 3-8; extend via data/build_seed_corpus.py.
fields: id | name | year (int or [start,end]) | period | themes[] | kind? (mechanism|background|event, optional) | one-line
kind_note: 'kind' (added on the expanded set) supports the scope_mismatch distractor: a SPECIFIC mechanism is the keyable 'most directly' answer; a co-period BACKGROUND condition is the tempting too-broad distractor. Keep >=1 mechanism and >=1 background per core-period episode.
